description.value: > Saurian Few creatures demand your respect and Awe like the mighty dinosaur. Associated Domain: Scalykind. Replacement Power: The following granted power replaces the serpent companion ability of the Scalykind domain. Dinosaur Companion (Ex) At 4th level, you gain the service of a loyal animal companion. Your effective druid level for this animal companion is equal to your cleric level â 2. You may only choose a dinosaur as your companion.
